content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Game 23". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1141/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n.
content.outputFormat: Print the result of the game.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: The goal is to make the other player take the last stone. To achieve this, we need to make sure that after our turn, the number of stones is a multiple of 4.
